display.purpose: Portfolio total value, coin price hero. One per screen.

headline.purpose: Section headers, page titles. One per view.

title.purpose: Card titles, list item primary labels, active tab labels.

body.purpose: Supporting descriptions, notes. Max ~40ch on mobile.

data.purpose: Every price, percentage, token amount, financial figure. No exceptions.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: State transitions — press, focus, active. The standard easing for all interactions.

breakpoints.name: mobile-max
breakpoints.purpose: Single breakpoint. Everything is designed for this width.

components.name: Buy Button
components.description: Primary CTA for purchase actions. Execution Teal fill, Void text.
components.css: .ds-btn-buy { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1ABCA3; color: #050A0A; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-buy:active { transform: scale(0.97); background: #13a48d; } .ds-btn-buy:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1ABCA3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sell Button
components.description: Destructive CTA for sell actions. Exit Red fill, Void text. Never soften the color.
components.css: .ds-btn-sell { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #FD4991; color: #050A0A; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-sell:active { transform: scale(0.97); background: #d42c7d; } .ds-btn-sell:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FD4991; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary non-destructive action. Transparent fill, Surface Lift border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #EEF0F5; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #132E2A; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1ABCA3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Score Badge — Low Risk
components.description: Risk Score badge for low-risk tokens. The product's core differentiator. Execution Teal fill.
components.css: .ds-badge-low { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #1ABCA3; color: #050A0A; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Score Badge — High Risk
components.description: Risk Score badge for high-risk tokens. Exit Red fill. Never placeholder — absent means unknown.
components.css: .ds-badge-high { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #FD4991; color: #050A0A; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Score Badge — Mid Risk
components.description: Risk Score badge for mid-risk tokens. Surface Lift fill, Text Secondary label, Border outline.
components.css: .ds-badge-mid { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #132E2A; color: #8892A4; border: 1px solid #1C3432; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Tab Bar Item — Active
components.description: Bottom navigation tab in active state. Execution Teal icon + label only.
components.html: Portfolio
components.css: .ds-tab-active { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: #1ABCA3; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Tab Bar Item — Inactive
components.description: Bottom navigation tab in inactive state. Text Muted only — no other indicator.
components.html: Coins
components.css: .ds-tab-inactive { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: #7B8799; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-tab-inactive:active { color: #1ABCA3; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search field. Surface Mid fill, 1px border shifts to Execution Teal on focus. No glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #0D1C1A; border: 1px solid #132E2A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-input-wrapper:focus-within { border-color: #1ABCA3; } .ds-input-icon { color: #7B8799; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-input-search { background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; color: #EEF0F5; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; width: 100%; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #7B8799; }

components.name: Coin List Item
components.description: Standard coin row in the market list. Avatar left, name center, price+delta right. Columns align across all rows.
components.html:
BTC
BitcoinBTC
$67,420+2.4%
components.css: .ds-coin-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #081110; border-bottom: 1px solid #1C3432; } .ds-coin-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #132E2A; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #8892A4; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.02em; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-coin-info { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; } .ds-coin-name { color: #EEF0F5; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-coin-symbol { color: #7B8799; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; } .ds-coin-price { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-coin-value { color: #EEF0F5; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-coin-delta { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-coin-delta--pos { color: #1ABCA3; } .ds-coin-delta--neg { color: #FD4991; }

narrative.overview:
Byrrgis is a tool for traders who already know what they're doing. The visual system never softens the data or apologizes for complexity — it cuts straight to the signal. Every design choice is justified by one question: does this help a user make a faster, better-informed decision?

The system is built on deep dark surfaces that recede completely (#050A0A through #132E2A), so data occupies the foreground without competition. Two semantic colors do the entire expressive work: Execution Teal (#1ABCA3) for positive signal and opportunity, Exit Red (#FD4991) for risk, loss, and alert. Everything else is neutral. There is no decoration. Components are contained and tense — no padding excess, no softening radius, no expressive shadow.

What this system explicitly rejects: the information overload and competing hierarchies of Binance and classic exchanges; the neon-on-pure-black DeFi hacker-terminal aesthetic; the navy-and-gold conservative fintech visual language that signals "bank" instead of "sharp"; the SaaS dashboard template with its hero metric number, tiny label, and gradient accent strip.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, high-contrast — optimized for varied lighting including direct sunlight on mobile
Exactly two accent colors, used with semantic precision; rarity is the point
Split typographic registers: Hanken Grotesk for language, JetBrains Mono for financial truth
430px max-width, iOS-optimized, primary actions in the bottom 40% of screen
Tonal depth — flat surfaces, no decorative shadows, depth through surface lightness steps

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Execution Teal and Exit Red are the only hues on any screen. They carry meaning because nothing else competes with them. Introducing a third accent dilutes both signals.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Each accent occupies ≤20% of any given screen. Their scarcity is why they read instantly.

rules.name: The Non-Black Rule
rules.body: The darkest value is #050A0A, not #000000. The background is void-adjacent but teal-tinted. Pure black reads as cheaper.

rules.name: The Two Register Rule
rules.body: Grotesk for language, Mono for financial numbers. Never mix them within the same label.

rules.name: The Flat Scale Rule
rules.body: No font size below 11px on mobile. Hierarchy comes from weight and color contrast, not dramatic size jumps.

rules.name: The Tonal Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Depth is communicated by surface lightness, not by elevation shadows. To place a component above another, move up one surface token.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: All interactive surfaces are flat until acted upon. Press states use transform: scale(0.97). No hover glow, no floating card effect.

dos: Do use JetBrains Mono for every price, percentage, token amount, and financial figure.
Do step up one surface token to establish depth — let tonal lightness do the work shadows would do.
Do keep Execution Teal and Exit Red as the only two hues on any screen.
Do make the Risk Score badge the most visually prominent non-data element on any coin view.
Do place primary actions in the bottom 40% of the screen, within thumb reach.
Do use 120ms ease-out for all state transitions.
Do establish hierarchy through weight and color contrast before increasing font size.
Do let column layout align across all list rows using fixed-width left and right slots.
donts: Don't introduce a third accent color.
Don't use gradient fills on text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't design like Binance: no competing visual hierarchies, no information overload.
Don't use neon on pure black — the DeFi hacker-terminal aesthetic is an anti-reference.
Don't use navy + gold or any visual language that reads as conservative fintech.
Don't use the SaaS dashboard template: big metric, small label, gradient accent strip.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored decorative stripe.
Don't animate layout properties — animate transform and opacity only.
